settings.title: FAQ
settings.index_heading: What do you want to know?

settings.title: What is DRiNK?
settings.answer: DRiNK is a premium hydration powder. You mix it with water. It tastes good and actually works. Electrolytes, B-vitamins, no fillers.

settings.title: How do I use it?
settings.answer: Add one scoop to 12–16 oz of water. Stir or shake. Done.

settings.title: What flavors are available?
settings.answer: Lemonade, Lychee, Peach Mango, Passion Fruit, and Matcha. Five flavors. All good.

settings.title: Is it sugar free?
settings.answer: Yes. Zero sugar. Zero artificial sweeteners. Zero guilt.

settings.title: Is it keto friendly?
settings.answer: Yes. Zero carbs that matter. Keto approved.

settings.title: What electrolytes are included?
settings.answer: Sodium, potassium, and magnesium. The ones your body actually needs.

settings.title: Is it caffeine free?
settings.answer: Every flavor except Matcha is caffeine free. Matcha contains natural caffeine from green tea.

settings.title: How many servings per tub?
settings.answer: 30 servings per tub. One scoop per serving.

settings.title: Can I mix flavors?
settings.answer: Your tub, your rules. Half scoop Lemonade, half scoop Peach Mango. Nobody is stopping you.
